channel.title: Tech Library
channel.description: Free tech tutorials, tools, lexicon, and digital survival guides

item.title: Windows Software Alternatives on Linux — Tech Library
item.description: Find Linux replacements for popular Windows software — Adobe, Office, gaming, and more.

item.title: WebAssembly (Wasm) — Tech Library
item.description: Run C/C++/Rust in the browser with WebAssembly — compilation, memory, and performance.

item.title: WebXR & Augmented Reality — Tech Library
item.description: Build AR/VR experiences for the web with WebXR API, A-Frame, and React Three Fiber.

item.title: Web Application Security — Tech Library
item.description: OWASP Top 10, XSS, CSRF, SQL injection, and securing web applications.

item.title: Ventoy Themes & Customization — Tech Library
item.description: Customize Ventoy with themes, boot splash screens, and personalized ISO menus.

item.title: VeraCrypt Full Disk Encryption — Tech Library
item.description: Secure your data with VeraCrypt — full disk, partition, and container encryption for all platforms.

item.title: System Design Interviews — Tech Library
item.description: Ace system design interviews — scalability, databases, caching, load balancing, and distributed systems.

item.title: Technical Writing & Documentation — Tech Library
item.description: Write clear technical documentation — API docs, tutorials, README files, and knowledge bases.

item.title: Statistical Modeling — Tech Library
item.description: Linear models, generalized linear models, mixed effects, and model selection for data analysis.

item.title: Shell Scripting & Dotfiles — Tech Library
item.description: Master shell scripting (bash/zsh) and manage dotfiles for a reproducible development environment.

item.title: Smartphone Buyer's Guide 2026 — Tech Library
item.description: Choose the best smartphone — Android vs iOS, camera, performance, battery, and value picks.

item.title: SDDM Display Manager Customization — Tech Library
item.description: Theme, configure, and customize SDDM — the modern Linux display manager for KDE Plasma.

item.title: Self-Hosted Software Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Self-host your own services — media, cloud storage, password manager, monitoring, and more.

item.title: ROS 2 Robotics — Tech Library
item.description: Robot Operating System 2 — nodes, topics, services, actions, and robot simulation.

item.title: Reinforcement Learning — Tech Library
item.description: RL fundamentals — Q-learning, policy gradients, PPO, DQN, and real-world applications.

item.title: React Native Cross-Platform — Tech Library
item.description: Build mobile apps for iOS and Android with React Native and Expo.

item.title: Raspberry Pi Projects & GPIO — Tech Library
item.description: Raspberry Pi fundamentals — GPIO programming, sensors, automation, and project ideas.

item.title: Progressive Web Apps (PWAs) — Tech Library
item.description: Build installable, offline-first web apps — service workers, cache strategies, and push notifications.

item.title: Probability & Statistics — Tech Library
item.description: Probability distributions, hypothesis testing, Bayesian inference — the foundation of data science and ML.

item.title: Podcast Production Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Plan, record, edit, and publish a professional podcast — from equipment to distribution.

item.title: PC Builder's Guide 2026 — Tech Library
item.description: Build the perfect PC for Linux — parts compatibility, vendor picks, and build guide.

item.title: Personal Knowledge Management — Tech Library
item.description: Build a second brain — Zettelkasten, PARA method, note-taking systems, and PKM tools.

item.title: Open Source Software Alternatives — Tech Library
item.description: Free and open-source alternatives to popular proprietary software across all categories.

item.title: OBS Studio Streaming — Tech Library
item.description: Professional live streaming, recording, and video production with OBS Studio — the free streaming software.

item.title: Open Source Contribution — Tech Library
item.description: Contribute to open source — finding projects, making PRs, community etiquette, and maintainer tips.

item.title: Numerical Methods — Tech Library
item.description: Root finding, interpolation, numerical integration, ODE solvers — computational techniques for engineering.

item.title: Network Security Monitoring — Tech Library
item.description: Monitor network traffic for threats — Zeek, Suricata, Snort, and security onion.

item.title: Music Production Basics — Tech Library
item.description: DAW fundamentals, MIDI, synthesis, mixing, and mastering — start making music at home.

item.title: Natural Language Processing — Tech Library
item.description: NLP fundamentals — tokenization, embeddings, transformers, and LLM fine-tuning.

item.title: Mobile App Testing — Tech Library
item.description: Test mobile apps — Espresso (Android), XCTests (iOS), Appium (cross-platform), and device farms.

item.title: ML4W Hyprland Configuration — Tech Library
item.description: ML4W (My Linux For Work) — the popular Hyprland dotfiles framework for Arch Linux.

item.title: MLOps & Model Deployment — Tech Library
item.description: MLOps pipeline — experiment tracking, model serving, monitoring, and CI/CD for ML.

item.title: Mechanical Keyboard Buyer's Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Find the perfect mechanical keyboard — switch types, form factors, keycaps, and vendors for Linux.

item.title: Linux System Rescue Toolkit — Tech Library
item.description: Rescue, recover, and repair Linux systems — live USB tools, chroot, fsck, and data recovery.

item.title: Linux Ricing Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Rice your Linux desktop — themes, icons, cursors, conky, polybar, and aesthetic system-wide customization.

item.title: Linux Power User Tools — Tech Library
item.description: Essential Linux utilities every power user should know — fd, ripgrep, fzf, bat, jq, and more.

item.title: Linux Network Configuration — Tech Library
item.description: Configure networking on Linux — interfaces, bridges, routing, DNS, and network namespaces.

item.title: The Linux Kernel & Modules — Tech Library
item.description: Understand the Linux kernel — architecture, modules, system calls, and basic driver development.

item.title: Linux Laptop Buyer's Guide 2026 — Tech Library
item.description: Find the best Linux-compatible laptop — hardware support, vendor recommendations, and specs.

item.title: Linux Container Management — Tech Library
item.description: Docker, Podman, LXC, and container orchestration for Linux power users.

item.title: Driver Updates on Linux — Tech Library
item.description: Manage hardware drivers on Linux — kernel modules, firmware, NVIDIA/AMD GPUs, and peripheral drivers.

item.title: Linear Algebra Fundamentals — Tech Library
item.description: Matrices, vectors, eigenvalues, and linear transformations — essential math for ML and graphics.

item.title: Linux Audio Configuration — Tech Library
item.description: Set up audio on Linux — PipeWire, PulseAudio, ALSA, and pro audio for music production.

item.title: Krita Digital Painting — Tech Library
item.description: Digital painting, concept art, and illustration with Krita — the professional free painting software.

item.title: Kubernetes Deep Dive — Tech Library
item.description: Kubernetes architecture, deployments, services, ingress, and cluster management.

item.title: Kerberos & Active Directory Security — Tech Library
item.description: Understand Kerberos protocol, AD attacks (Kerberoasting, AS-REP Roasting, Golden Ticket), and defenses.

item.title: Video Editing with Kdenlive — Tech Library
item.description: Professional non-linear video editing with Kdenlive — the free open-source video editor.

item.title: Inkscape Vector Graphics — Tech Library
item.description: Create logos, illustrations, and scalable vector graphics with Inkscape — the free SVG editor.

item.title: Internationalization (i18n) & Localization — Tech Library
item.description: Internationalize apps — i18n frameworks, translations, locale-specific formatting, and RTL support.

item.title: iOS App Development — Tech Library
item.description: Build iOS apps with Swift, SwiftUI, and Xcode for iPhone and iPad.
